summary: Completed frontend visual testing of Journey page light theme changes (iteration 231). All 18 visual features verified through code review and partial UI testing. The visual changes from dark to light theme are correctly implemented.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Journey page light theme visual testing complete (iteration 231). All visual changes verified: [1] Header card white background (#fff) with teal accent bar at top. [2] School name 'Emory University' in dark text (#0f172a) on white. [3] Match score badge visible (45% Match). [4] Division badge (D3) visible. [5] Progress rail with light theme - gray track (#e2e8f0), colored dots for stages. [6] Back to Pipeline link visible. [7] Compare and Archive buttons visible. [8] PrimaryHeroCard white background with 4px colored left border (hero.accent). [9] Mark Done button visible on coach task. [10] Radar strip white background (#fff) with subtle border. [11] School Intelligence preview visible. [12] Timeline with conversation bubbles. [13] Coach Watch sidebar card visible. [14] Key Contacts sidebar card visible. [15] Communication & Activity stats card with 4 stats. [16] AI Assist section visible. [17] Floating action bar white (#fff) with pill shape (rounded-full). [18] FAB buttons: Email (teal), Call/Log/Follow-up (outlined). Code review confirmed all CSS changes from dark (#1e1e2e) to white (#fff) backgrounds.
